summary: A 2018 DHS/NFL co-branded 'See Something, Say Something' PSA in which an NFL referee in a locker room speaks to camera, drawing an analogy between officiating and watching the stands, urging fans to report suspicious activity to local law enforcement. It is a narrated awareness spot with NFL/DHS logos, not a music-driven entertainment piece or genre experiment, and predates the second Trump administration. Out of scope: informational narrated PSA, no song-driven cinematic styling, no youth/genre appeal.
notable_text: You play an important role in keeping our communities safe. / If you see something suspicious... say something to local law enforcement. / Report suspicious activity to local law enforcement. WE CARE ABOUT THE SAFETY OF OUR FANS. NFL / Homeland Security.
